Name: The time between a 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and the assignment of a different editor ('Assign a Different Editor')
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Assign a Different Editor'

Name: Time until 'SW-Reviewer Declined' after a 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Time from 'SW-Reviewer Declined' to 'Unassign Editor' in challenge paper handling variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Unassign Editor'

Name: 'SW-Reviewer Declined' Cycle Time within the initial reviewer selection phase
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Reviewer Declined and the end of the case

Name: Average time it takes 'SW-Reviewer Declined' after the execution of 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Total resolution time of the reviewer decline event for a specific manuscript
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Reviewer Declined and the end of the case

Name: Elapsed time between consecutive 'SW-Reviewer Declined' events in the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Time to 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation' since the last 'SW-Reviewer Declined' in a major revision variant
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Average time from 'SW-Reviewer Declined' to 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late'

Name: Difference in average time for 'SW-Reviewer Declined' between variants ending in 'SW-EIC Reject' and variants ending in 'SW-EIC Major Revision'
